name: HOOD RPG
short_description: Dark Humor & Satire: Experience a story that blends comedic mischief with clever parody, ensuring laughs and surprises at every turn. Engage in unconventional turn-based battles. Be ready to fall over laughing!
detailed_description:
In HOOD rpg, join Leonard and Lyzol on their chaotic journey as they escape from jail and dive headfirst into the gritty underbelly of the big city. Navigate through the bustling streets and shadowy alleys, where they’ll meet an eclectic cast of characters—each with their own quirks, motivations, and skills. Laughs around every corner!

Features

WORKS WITH STEAMDECK

Turn-Based Combat RPG

Engage in strategic, Turn-based combat where every decision counts! Find a good strategy do defeat challenging dungeons and bosses. Each with a unique set of skills and funny features.

Comedy and Dark Humor

Experience a storyline full of dark humor, clever dialogue, and absurd situations that will keep you entertained from start to finish. Every area has new jokes and characters to keep you laughing.

Secret Items and Unlockable Characters

Seek out and recruit hidden players but be ready for a long silly quest. Find several hidden items and some hidden areas throughout the game.

Funny Puzzles and Mazes

Navigate through long mazes and try to solve hilarious puzzles or possibly meet your doom.
